dresscode.a: Traditional Indian attire is preferred and encouraged. For all ceremonies — sarees, lehengas, sherwanis and kurtas are perfect. Feel free to wear your best traditional wear throughout the celebrations.

kids.a: Absolutely! Children are a cherished part of Indian wedding celebrations. We welcome little ones with open arms.

parking.a: Yes, parking is available at the venue. Please coordinate with family members for directions on the day.

photos.a: Yes, please do! We encourage everyone to capture the memories. We do ask that during the Pheras, you remain seated and allow our photographer to work.

gifts.a: Your blessings and presence are the greatest gifts. If you wish to give, cash gifts are greatly appreciated.

food.a: All ceremonies will have a delicious full vegetarian menu. We take great care to ensure everyone is well fed and happy!
